series_metadata.series_description: Vendor/audit card file, air/water pollution certificates, audit records, refund claims.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: ST1 - Retain 10 years, then destroyed. ST2 - Retain 5 years, then destroyed. Retain for 6 months after scanned. ; Electronic: ST1 - Retain 10 years, then delete. ST2 - Retain 5 years, then delete., Paper: Burn ; Electronic: Delete
